creator: robert@indylix.nl
text:
Acknowledged.

Can you create an issue report under Supporting Services -> Bug Tracker if you haven't already

Thanks Robert!

--
Regards,

Kubilay Kocak

> On 16 Nov 2014, at 1:00 pm, Robert Sevat <robert.sevat@live.nl> wrote:
>
> Hello,
>
> There currently doesn't exist a freebsd 10.1 bug category under kernel
> in bugzilla. Latest category is 10.1-rc2.
>
> Could you please create it? We found a kernel panic we'd like to report
> under 10.1
>
> Kind Regards,
> Robert Sevat
